name: CSV
comment: Authored for Editora. Delimiter-agnostic: colors quoted fields, bare numbers, and the field separators (comma / semicolon / tab / pipe) — column-position tinting is done by the editor overlay, not the grammar (TextMate can't count columns). Multi-line quoted fields are handled by the grid parser, not here.

patterns.comment: Quoted field; a doubled quote is the RFC-4180 escape.
patterns.name: string.quoted.double.csv

patterns.comment: A bare numeric field (integer / decimal / scientific), anchored between field separators.
patterns.name: constant.numeric.csv
